name: WD_COURSE_RUNNING
description: Active washing course display using WD_CourseProgressBase. Shows all course progress information during active wash cycle. Wrapper adding proper layout and dimensions to base component.
visualForm: Course progress display (310x240px) showing title, time, progress, status during wash
descriptionKo: WD_CourseProgressBase를 사용하는 세탁 코스 실행 중 표시 컴포넌트입니다. 세탁 주기가 활성화된 동안 모든 코스 진행 정보를 완전한 310x240px 레이아웃으로 보여주는 래퍼입니다.
descriptionEn: Active washing course display using WD_CourseProgressBase. Shows all course progress information during active wash cycle. Wrapper adding proper layout and dimensions to base component.
